title: Large Iron Sign
description: Adds a sign that displays a single large character
body:
# Large Iron Sign

This is a mod for Minecraft that adds a sign that displays a single large character. The character can be any capital letter, numeric digit, or one of 40 other symbols.

![All symbols](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/3d81066d9dae7b1ecf02525f83c949fbad62bcbd.png)

![All symbols](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/47465908d5f9dd9223b30443c41ba7b3e2af94cc.png)

The sign can be coloured, both the text and the background separately.

![All colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/60bafc1453e3549c2150ed24d047240c5a248ec4.png)

An optional trim can be added to the sign.

![All colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/5d0d73b81c3c291edfd348e1c469eacb9c52275e.png)


## Dependencies

| Minecraft | Java | Fabric Loader | Fabric API      |
|-----------|------|---------------|-----------------|
| 1.21.1    | 21   | 0.16.5        | 0.105.0+1.21.1  |
| 1.21.3    | 21   | 0.16.10       | 0.109.0+1.21.3  |
| 1.21.4    | 21   | 0.16.10       | 0.113.0+1.21.4  |
| 1.21.5    | 21   | 0.16.14       | 0.121.0+1.21.5  |
| 1.21.7    | 21   | 0.16.14       | 0.128.2+1.21.7  |
| 1.21.8    | 21   | 0.17.3        | 0.136.0+1.21.8  |
| 1.21.10   | 21   | 0.17.3        | 0.136.0+1.21.10 |


## How to Use

To make signs, use an iron block in a stonecutter. This will produce 16 signs.

![How to make sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/46be967723831c6aa899348d5a9930e1a609812c.png)

Place the sign, then right-click it and select the character it should display. You can also enable/disable the trim here.

![How to select character](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/f1005b4f87d9bcaae24f6d54f78b232925a788e8.png)

To change the text colour, hold a dye in your main hand and right-click the sign.

To change the background colour, hold a dye in your off hand and right-click the sign.

If you have a dye in both hands, you can set both the text and background colour at the same time.

![How to dye the sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1lwS2YH4/images/b7f853e6624f229bd27d3d31ec27339dfe1d7840.png)


## Credits

Textures based on font: https://www.dafont.com/vcr-osd-mono.font
